output.sparql:
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?actor WHERE {
  wd:Q83071 p:P161 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P161 ?actor ; pq:P453 ?role .
  ?role rdfs:label ?roleLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?roleLabel) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(LCASE(?roleLabel) = 'lady mary crawley')
  .
}

PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT ?actor WHERE {
  wd:Q83071 p:P161 ?castStatement.
  ?castStatement ps:P161 ?actor.
  ?castStatement pq:P453 ?role.
  ?role rdfs:label ?roleLabel.
  FILTER(LANG(?roleLabel) = "en").
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?roleLabel), "mary crawley") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?roleLabel), "lady mary")).
}

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?actor WHERE {
  wd:Q83071 p:P161 ?statement.
  ?statement ps:P161 ?actor;
             pq:P453 ?role.
  ?role rdfs:label ?roleLabel.
  FILTER (LANG(?roleLabel) = 'en').
  FILTER (LCASE(?roleLabel) = 'lady mary crawley').
}
